tables.description: The GoTickets Event.

columns.name: EventId
columns.description: The Event Id. (Unique Identifier)

columns.name: EventName
columns.description: The event name.
columns.example: Band of Horses with Bella White

columns.name: EventStatus
columns.description: The status of the event. Can be on of 'As_Scheduled', 'Postponed', 'Cancelled', 'Rescheduled', or 'Merged'.

columns.name: EventDateTimeLocal
columns.description: The local event date time.

columns.name: EventTimestampUtc
columns.description: The event date time in UTC.

columns.name: EventClusterId
columns.description: The EventCluster Id if any, otherwise NULL.

columns.name: VenueId
columns.description: The Venue Id.

columns.name: PrimaryPerformerId
columns.description: The Primary (IsMaster) Performer Id.

columns.name: IsParking
columns.description: Whether this is a parking event.

columns.name: IfNecessary
columns.description: Indicates whether the event occurs only if necessary. (eg: 7th game)

columns.name: IsDateTbd
columns.description: Whether the event date is to-be-determined.

columns.name: IsTimeTbd
columns.description: Whether the event time is to-be-determined.

columns.name: MergedToEventId
columns.description: If this event has been merged into another event, then this will be the valid event's Id, otherwise NULL.

columns.name: ParkingEventId
columns.description: Can be NULL

columns.name: ChangedTimestampUtc
columns.description: The timestamp of when the change was recorded internally. This value correspond to the records's UpdatedTimestampUtc audit column.

example_rows.EventName: Band of Horses with Bella White

tables.description: The GoTickets Event.

columns.name: EventId
columns.description: The Event Id. (Unique Identifier)

columns.name: EventStatus
columns.description: The status of the event. Can be on of 'As_Scheduled', 'Postponed', 'Cancelled', 'Rescheduled', or 'Merged'.

columns.name: EventTimestampUtc
columns.description: The event date time in UTC.

columns.name: PreviousPresaleDateTimeUtc
columns.description: The most recent PRESALE date time prior to the current date time, if any.

columns.name: NextPresaleDateTimeUtc
columns.description: The next upcoming PRESALE date time after the current date time, if any.

columns.name: PreviousOnsaleDateTimeUtc
columns.description: The most recent ONSALE date time prior to the current date time, if any.

columns.name: NextOnsaleDateTimeUtc
columns.description: The next upcoming ONSALE date time after the current date time, if any.

columns.name: IsFutureEvent
columns.description: Whether the event is in the future.

columns.name: IsFutureScheduled
columns.description: Whether the event is in the future and the event date time has been determined.

columns.name: IsFutureTbd
columns.description: Whether the event is in the future but the event date time is to-be-determined.

columns.name: ChangedTimestampUtc
columns.description: The timestamp of when the change was recorded internally. This value correspond to the records's UpdatedTimestampUtc audit column.
